description:
Enpass is a cross-platform password management app to securely store passwords and other credentials in a virtual vault locked with a master password. Unlike most other popular password managers, Enpass is an offline password manager.


What's new
This release improves passkey compatibility across more websites and browsers, and makes autofill smarter when you have multiple vaults.
Improvements
- Sign in with passkeys across related domains Services that run across multiple domains — like regional sites — now work with a passkey created on the main domain. Fewer unexpected sign-in failures, more places your passkeys just work.
- Resolved an issue in vault restoration where vaults created on OneDrive, SharePoint, or Microsoft Teams could fail to restore in certain scenarios for B2B users.
Support & feedback
Need help or have feedback?
Visit our support page [https://support.enpass.io/home.htm ]
